assumptions: No prior Pulumi account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: Pulumi creates the getting-started AWS resource and records a successful stack update in Pulumi Cloud.

first_success.outcome: Pulumi creates the getting-started AWS resource and records a successful stack update in Pulumi Cloud.
first_success.observable_signal: pulumi up completes successfully and reports the created resource and stack outputs.

route_selection.surface: Pulumi Cloud + AWS get started: first pulumi up
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Pulumi Cloud + AWS get started: first pulumi up

candidates.name: Pulumi Cloud + AWS get started: first pulumi up
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Pulumi Cloud.
required_path.observable_result: The Pulumi Cloud organization is accessible.

required_path.action: Install and authenticate the Pulumi CLI, then configure AWS credentials.
required_path.observable_result: The CLI can access Pulumi Cloud and AWS.

required_path.action: Create the AWS getting-started project and review its generated resource code.
required_path.observable_result: A Pulumi stack and starter project exist.

required_path.action: Run pulumi up and approve the proposed deployment.
required_path.observable_result: The stack update creates the AWS resource successfully.

required_path.action: Inspect the completed update and its reported resources or outputs.
required_path.observable_result: pulumi up reports a successful update.

prerequisites.description: An AWS account with credentials authorized to create the tutorial resource.
The Pulumi CLI, an AWS credential configuration, and a supported project runtime.

external_gates.description: AWS credentials need permission to create the resource in the selected region.
AWS resource usage can incur charges under the AWS account.

platform_outcomes.description: Pulumi creates the getting-started AWS resource and records a successful stack update in Pulumi Cloud.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Deploy with pulumi up
evidence_supported: Pulumi creates the getting-started AWS resource and records a successful stack update in Pulumi Cloud.
pulumi up completes successfully and reports the created resource and stack outputs.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Deploy with pulumi up path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
